bio.Recent_Position: Product Marketing Intern at Intel in Santa Clara, CA
bio.Bios: Heyo! I’m Lisa, and I initiated in my fall quarter of my first year. In my free time, I love working on projects, whether that's watching all of Naruto & Bojack Horseman in 3 months, photoshopping my dad's face on fruit, or plotting world domination. Fun fact: I’ve learned over 25 styles of dance (and counting!). Ask me about anything above or my love for architecture at recruitment :)
